description_long: This arcade game cabinet features a tall, rectangular structure with a slightly angled front panel housing a large display screen. The control panel is equipped with a single red joystick and four red buttons arranged in a diamond pattern, suggesting a single-player setup. The cabinet is predominantly dark blue or black, with a metallic finish and subtle geometric decals on the front. The lower front section includes a metallic coin slot panel with two red buttons, indicating its use in coin-operated environments. The back of the cabinet is plain, with two visible ventilation fans for cooling. The top section has a marquee area with a minimalist geometric logo, but no elaborate artwork or text.
description: A tall, dark arcade game cabinet with a single joystick, four red buttons, and a metallic coin slot panel. The cabinet has a minimalist design with subtle geometric accents and a plain back with ventilation fans.
description_view_0: Front view showing the display screen, control panel with joystick and buttons, coin slot panel, and geometric decals.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the cabinet's angular profile and the protruding control panel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying two ventilation fans and a smooth, unadorned back panel.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, showing the cabinet's stepped silhouette and control panel depth.
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single-player layout with one red joystick on the left and four red buttons arranged in a diamond pattern on the right; no visible markings.
attribute_marquee_artwork: Minimalist marquee with a geometric logo, no elaborate artwork or text.
